```repl
import json

raw = await read_file(path="/tmp/ironclaw_live_codeact_shims/read_json/payload.json", offset=1, limit=2000)
text = raw["content"] if isinstance(raw, dict) and "content" in raw else str(raw)

lines = text.splitlines()
stripped = []
for line in lines:
    if "| " in line:
        parts = line.split("| ", 1)
        if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit():
            stripped.append(parts[1])
        else:
            stripped.append(line)
    else:
        stripped.append(line)

payload = json.loads("\n".join(stripped))
value = int(payload["answer"])
FINAL(f"answer={value}")
```

response.content:
```repl
import json

raw = await read_file(path="/tmp/ironclaw_live_codeact_shims/read_json/payload.json", offset=1, limit=50)
text = raw["content"] if isinstance(raw, dict) and "content" in raw else str(raw)

clean_lines = []
for line in text.splitlines():
    sep = line.find("│")
    if sep != -1:
        prefix = line[:sep].strip()
        if prefix.isdigit():
            clean_lines.append(line[sep + 1 :].lstrip())
        else:
            clean_lines.append(line)
    else:
        clean_lines.append(line)

payload = json.loads("\n".join(clean_lines))
FINAL(f"answer={int(payload['answer'])}")
```
